description: A square 'GANG ARREST' rogues-gallery style card produced by ICE. The base is a blurry photograph of a bald, gray-bearded older man (the arrestee, Cesar Lopez-Larios) standing indoors wearing a dark shirt with a yellow lanyard/strap; the back of another person in a gray shirt is visible at left foreground, suggesting an in-custody booking scene. Overlaid diagonally across the image in large, distressed cream/tan graffiti-stencil lettering are the words 'GANG' (upper left) and 'ARREST' (lower right, crossing the image at an angle), evoking gang-tag street typography. A dark banner across the top right carries white serif text 'MS-13' with 'La Mara Salvatrucha' beneath it. A semi-transparent dark-red box at lower left contains the subject's name in bold white, 'Cesar Lopez-Larios', followed by a bulleted charge list: 'Material support to terrorists; Financing terrorism; Narco-terrorism; Acts of terrorism.' The DHS seal and 'ICE' wordmark appear at lower right. The design technique blends a mugshot/wanted-poster format with gang-graffiti aesthetics and terrorism framing to dramatize the arrest, targeting a public-facing social media audience to promote ICE's gang/'terrorist' enforcement narrative.
notable_text: GANG ARREST; MS-13 La Mara Salvatrucha; Cesar Lopez-Larios; Material support to terrorists; Financing terrorism; Narco-terrorism; Acts of terrorism
